query:
ALTER TABLE systemAccounts 
ADD COLUMN isMember BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE COMMENT '是否是会员',
ADD COLUMN membershipOrderId INT NULL COMMENT '会员订单ID',
ADD COLUMN membershipActivatedAt TIMESTAMP NULL COMMENT '会员激活时间';
command:

ADD COLUMN membershipOrderId INT NULL COMMENT '会员订单ID',
